Leptoloma coenicola is further categorized as an epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants for support. This species is native to Australia and is found in the wild, specifically in the eastern regions. Leptoloma coenicola's classification also places it within the subfamily of epidendroids, which includes many other orchid species.
